name: Sanibel Island Chowder Co. Chicken Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless boneless chicken breasts, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in plenty of boiling salted water until tender but firm to the bite, 10 to 12 minutes, or according to package directions. Drain.
2. In a skillet over medium-high heat, sauté garlic, salt, and white pepper in 1/4 cup butter for 2 to 3 minutes, until garlic is softened.
3. Add onion, bacon, and chicken; cook until bacon is browned but not crisp and chicken is cooked through and no longer pink, about 10 minutes.
4. Add sun-dried tomatoes, ham, peas, and green onions; cook, stirring, until heated through, about 2 minutes.
5. Whisk together cream and egg yolks in a bowl. Stir into the skillet with cheese. Add remaining butter cubes; stir until melted, 1 to 2 minutes.
6. Pour over pasta and toss.
[6 servings. Each serving: 1,109 calories; 1,861 mg sodium; 479 mg cholesterol; 98 grams fat; 28 grams carbohydrates; 33 grams protein; 0.84 gram fiber.]
